sanitization: Only public labels, basename-only provenance, sanitized resolved configs, loss events, summaries, and peak-memory fields are retained; paths, checkpoints, driver logs, and status logs are omitted. Original batch-64 and batch-432 runs are retained as learning-rate retuning evidence.

memory_limit_probes.method: One-step isolated BF16 probes with the baseline architecture; failures are classified without retaining raw CUDA error text or device identifiers.
memory_limit_probes.conclusion: Effective batch 432 completes one optimizer step, while 440, 448, and 512 fail during the first loss forward pass with torch.cuda.OutOfMemoryError.
